title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 19 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 19 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 19 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 19/01/2022
DCE iron ore futures rose largely today，an increase of 4.26% throughout the day. the quotation in the morning was increased by 30-40yuan/mt over yesterday. Today port spot trading volume has increased, but more speculation with traders.
